meta.question: Which models of the organization have tasks about purchasing goods? (Organization ID: 985f88f59e8b4962a0a2c2fec001b6d1)
meta.finalAnswer:
The model "Wohnungskauf (BPMN Choreographie)" (ID: sid_17854d3c_f32e_48b0_ad92_84fdf99d92f7) belonging to the specified organization contains tasks related to purchasing goods (in this case, an apartment). Relevant tasks within this model include:
- "Unterschreiben des Vertrags" (Signing the contract)
- "Kredit geben" (Granting a loan)
- "Besichtigung" (Viewing)
- "Eintragung" (Registration)
